outputPreview: The input provides a partial code slice (Chunk 1/2) containing evidence for targeting, attack cadence, and tick-driven combat logic. Main files identified are Globals\Drones.gd and Globals\Frigates.gd for targeting priorities; entities\unit\Unit.gd and managers\player\Player_Manager.gd for core logic ticks; and Globals\utils\CombatUtils.gd for global target resolution. The slice is truncated mid-stream, so full scope verification requires raw review.
